The droid bomber is a model of starfighter utilized by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during their [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion of Naboo]]. [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]] encountered many of these fighters during [[Skirmishes in the Naboo countryside|his mission]] to repel the occupation force, witnessing them assigned to tasks such as destroying civilian centers like [[Rohan Wayside]]'s [[Trading village (Naboo swamps)|trading village]] and the town of [[Ferentina]], as well as lesser tasks of performing patrols and seeking the downed [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kael (officer)|Kael]].<ref name="BFN" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' {{1st}}
